model_input:
You are a UI clicking agent. Given a screenshot of a screen, determine the pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at(x, y, confidence) with the center pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on the green element in the top left corner of the image.
The green element is a small rectangle at the top left.
Looking at the image, the green rectangle is located at roughly (54, 41).
Let's refine the coordinates.
The image size is 1000x750.
The green rectangle starts at (15, 15) and ends at around (93, 67).
Center would be around (54, 41).
